text: It was narrated that YA (<o 4 =) said - | think he attributed it to the Prophet (&) “Whoover tels a i about hs dream will be ordered to tie grain of barkey on the Day of Resurreation ™ Grade: Sahih because of corroborating evidence; this is a daeef isnad] (Darussalam) Reference 3 Musnad Ahmad 1088
